headline: India GLP 1 Generics Test Novo Nordisk Pricing Power And Valuation
summary: Cheap semaglutide generics have launched in India following local loss of exclusivity for Novo Nordisk, triggering rapid price cuts and market share shifts in GLP-1 treatments. Dozens of low cost versions are pressuring pricing for obesity and diabetes drugs, prompting Novo Nordisk to lower prices on its own GLP-1 brands. Eli Lilly’s GLP-1 franchise is also seeing volume effects as patients switch to generics, offering an early look at how global patent expiries could affect GLP-1...

headline: Eli Lilly vs. Novo Nordisk: The Obesity Drug Race Has a New Leader
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) and Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE:NVO) reported quarterly results in early February, and the gap between them has widened significantly. Lilly’s tirzepatide franchise is accelerating. Novo is cutting jobs, warning of a sales decline, and leaning on a newly launched pill to stabilize its position. Tirzepatide Pulls Away. headline: LLY Launches GLP-1 Pill, Expands Access Through Pharmacy Partnerships
summary: Eli Lilly launches oral GLP-1 pill Foundayo, pairing low-cost access with Amazon and GoodRx partnerships to challenge rivals in the fast-growing obesity market.

headline: Novo Nordisk's GLP-1 pill momentum faces pricing test, says leading bank
summary: Novo Nordisk (NYSE:NVO) reports first-quarter 2026 results on 6 May, with UBS flagging that the results will provide the first meaningful look at the company's economics at new, lower price points for its GLP-1 (glucagon-like peptide-1) obesity and diabetes drugs. headline: Amazon Pharmacy to offer Eli Lilly’s Foundayo via same-day delivery
summary: Amazon Pharmacy (AMZN) now offers Eli Lilly and Company’s (LLY) recently approved GLP-1 medication, Foundayo, a once daily oral treatment for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related medical problems. Customers with a valid prescription can order Foundayo through Amazon Pharmacy, see real-time medication availability and transparent pricing, and receive fast medication delivery directly to their door nationwide. With insurance, pricing starts as low as $1 per day or $25 per month. F

headline: Who Benefits From Amazon Pharmacy Stocking Eli Lilly’s New Weight Loss Pill
summary: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) just made a quiet move that could reshape how Americans access weight-loss drugs. On April 9, 2026, it announced that its pharmacy unit will stock new GLP-1 weight-loss pill Foundayo at One Medical kiosks and offer same-day home delivery, with plans to expand that access to 4,500 locales by end of 2026. ... headline: Amazon (AMZN) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of cloud computing and online retail behemoth Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) jumped 4.5% in the afternoon session after CEO Andy Jassy's annual shareholder letter revealed that the company's artificial intelligence (AI) business was performing strongly.

headline: Eli Lilly market share drops, Novo Nordisk holds firm as generic weight-loss drugs flood India
summary: Eli Lilly loses share in India’s GLP‑1 market as cheap semaglutide generics surge, while Novo holds steady after deep price cuts to defend Ozempic, Wegovy.

headline: Amazon AI Chips And Foundayo Pill Reframe Growth And ESG Debate
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) outlined an expanded AI chip vision in CEO Andy Jassy’s annual shareholder letter, including plans to sell homegrown chips alongside major industry suppliers. Amazon Pharmacy began offering Eli Lilly’s Foundayo weight-loss pill with options such as same-day delivery, signaling a deeper move into direct-to-patient healthcare services. Multiple shareholder proposals focused on climate and governance were filed ahead of the annual meeting, with Amazon’s management...
